name: Animated Shield
description: While holding this Shield, you can take a Bonus Action to cause it to animate. The Shield leaps into the air and hovers in your space to protect you as if you were wielding it, leaving your hands free. The Shield remains animate for 1 minute, until you take a Bonus Action to end this effect, or until you die or have the Incapacitated condition, at which point the Shield falls to the ground or into your hand if you have one free.

attunement.description: You must attune to this shield by holding it for 1 hour.

activation.description: Use a bonus action to animate the shield; use another bonus action to end the effect

triggers: You use a bonus action to end it
deactivation.result: Shield falls to ground or into your hand if one is free

tactical_uses: Free up hands for two-weapon fighting
Use both hands for two-handed weapons
notes: This shield can be animated once per turn and remains animated for 1 minute, freeing your hands for other activities.
